_meta.description: Machine-readable index of every module in the Pathfinder Frappe app. Read this file FIRST before exploring the codebase — it tells you exactly where to look for any given concern.
_meta.usage: Find the module whose 'purpose' matches your task, then read only that file and its 'depends_on' entries.

architecture.overview: Pathfinder is a standalone Frappe v15 app providing a visual field-path navigator. Users browse DocType link chains (e.g. Sales Order → Customer → Territory → name) and create *virtual fields* — dot-notation paths that resolve values across linked documents at runtime. Supports dual output: Frappe paths for virtual fields and Vue form display, Jinja tags for email/SMS/text templates. Consuming apps (NCE Events, NCE Studio) import components or call APIs.
architecture.data_flow: Vue SPA (PathFinderCore → PathColumn) → frappe.call(pathfinder.api.get_doctype_fields) → Frappe ORM → MariaDB | User selects path → PathFinderPanel emits path-selected or jinja-tag-selected event → consuming app handles output | Virtual field saved as Pathfinder Virtual Field DocType → on document load, inject_virtual_fields hook resolves values and attaches to doc._virtual_fields | resolve_virtual_fields API returns both resolved value and Jinja tag for any path
key_patterns: Many-to-One traversal only (Phase 1) — follows Link fields in drill-down direction
Dual output: every resolver returns both Frappe dot-notation path AND Jinja template tag
Table fields and Dynamic Link fields excluded from Phase 1 with PHASE 2 placeholder comments
inject_virtual_fields doc_events hook is zero-cost — caches doctypes-with-vfields in Redis before any DB query
PathFinderPanel is refactored to be event-driven — no canvasStore or studioStore coupling
useFieldMeta composable uses module-level Map cache + in-flight request deduplication
Pathfinder Virtual Field DocType auto-resolves terminal_fieldtype on save via controller validate()

hooks.py.purpose: App config: metadata, frontend JS bundle include on all Desk pages, doc_events onload hook for virtual field injection

install.py.purpose: Post-install hook — placeholder for default role/permission setup

api/pathfinder_api.py.purpose: All whitelisted backend endpoints: field metadata browsing, virtual field CRUD, path resolution with dual output (Frappe path + Jinja tag), and doc_events onload injection handler

api/__init__.py.purpose: Re-exports all whitelisted API endpoints for clean imports

pathfinder/utils/path_utils.py.purpose: Portable path utilities with zero Frappe dependencies — path validation, binding, display formatting, ID generation

pathfinder/doctype/pathfinder_virtual_fi.purpose: Stores a virtual field definition: source DocType, dot-notation path, display settings. On validate, auto-resolves terminal fieldtype and options by walking the path through DocType metadata. Naming: source_doctype-field_label slug.

frontend/src/main.js.purpose: Vue app entry point — re-exports all Pathfinder components for consuming apps

frontend/src/components/PathFinderCore.v.purpose: Multi-column field navigator — maintains column state stack, builds dot-notation path from selections, handles drill-down for Link/Table/Dynamic Link fields, circular reference detection via visited doctypes set
sections: Current path display with confirm button

frontend/src/components/PathColumn.vue.purpose: Single column of fields with drill-down — loads DocType metadata via useFieldMeta composable, color-codes field types (blue=Link, orange=Table, purple=Dynamic Link), circular reference warnings
sections: Fields list with color-coded dots and row hover

frontend/src/components/PathFinderDialog.purpose: Tabbed dialog wrapping PathFinderCore (field path tab) and whitelisted methods (button action tab) — repointed to pathfinder.api.get_whitelisted_methods
sections: Pending value footer with Insert button

frontend/src/components/PathFinderPanel..purpose: Refactored panel with DocType selector + navigation — event-driven API with no NCE Studio coupling. Emits path-selected AND jinja-tag-selected for consuming apps to choose output format
sections: Footer with dual output buttons (Use Frappe Path / Use Jinja Tag)

frontend/src/components/PathFinderPanelD.purpose: Thin wrapper around PathFinderCore — used in designer contexts where only path selection is needed

frontend/src/components/index.ts.purpose: Barrel export for all Pathfinder Vue components

frontend/src/composables/useFieldMeta.ts.purpose: Cached DocType field metadata fetcher — module-level Map cache + in-flight request deduplication. Repointed from studio.api to pathfinder.api.get_doctype_fields

frontend/src/types/index.ts.purpose: TypeScript interfaces — stripped to essentials (no NCE Studio types like FormDefinition, EditLock, ThemeSettings)
sections: FieldPath (full path with segments + terminal field)

frontend/src/tests/pathUtils.test.js.purpose: Vitest tests for path utilities — validation, binding, field creation, display formatting

frontend/vite.config.js.purpose: Vite build config — builds frontend into pathfinder/public/js/pathfinder.bundle.js

frontend/package.json.purpose: NPM dependencies — Vue 3, frappe-ui, Vite build tooling
